tree.name: DaRon Holmes II
tree.tradeDescription: Denver traded the #28 pick (Ryan Dunn), the #56 pick (Kevin McCullar Jr.), and 2026 and 2031 2nd round picks to Phoenix for the #22 pick (DaRon Holmes II)

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 1st Round Pick (#28)
assetsGivenUp.note: Denver's own 28th overall pick, sent to Phoenix in Holmes trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 2nd Round Pick (#56)
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from OKC in 2023 4-team trade (least favorable of MIN/CHO), sent to Phoenix in Holmes trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2026 2nd Round Pick via DEN
assetsGivenUp.note: Denver's own 2026 second-round pick, sent to Phoenix

assetsGivenUp.name: 2031 2nd Round Pick via DEN
assetsGivenUp.note: Denver's own 2031 second-round pick, sent to Phoenix
